name: S-12 merge tags operator-only entries with origin: operator and class: operator-curated per the §2.6 schema
command: printf -- '[]' > catalog.yaml && printf -- '- id: custom-source\n  url: https://x.com\n' > operator.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/merge-registry.sh" --catalog catalog.yaml --operator operator.yaml --emit merged.yaml && grep -q 'origin: operator' merged.yaml && grep -q 'class: operator-curated' merged.yaml && echo tagged 1>&2
